g.text: Phase 0: Project Inception (One-time for new projects)
Phase 1: Milestone Planning (Optional - for sprint organization)
Phase 2: Story Management (Optional - not all issues need stories)
• Suggest commands: Fast analysis, no side effects (/project/milestones/suggest, /project/issues/suggest)
• Create commands: Deep research, actual creation (/project/milestones/create, /project/issues/create)
